title: Add Tasks
description: Add Instagram profile URLs or usernames to scrape using the lobstr.io API

content.introduction: Add Instagram profiles as tasks to your squid. You can provide either a full profile URL or just the username.

rows.description: Instagram Profile URL or Username to scrape profile information from

proTips.content: You can use just the username without the full URL - the scraper will resolve it automatically.
Private profiles will return limited data. Only public profile information is accessible.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Instagram Profile Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Instagram profile URLs or usernames as tasks to extract profile data using the lobstr.io API.
